name: Fisher Family Pickleball
description: Fisher Family Pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Burnsville, NC. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is private. You can’t reserve the court. Amenities include restrooms and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Mountain Air
description: Come play pickleball at Mountain Air in Burnsville, NC! There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like water. The courts are private.
